description_long: This is a compact, modern submachine gun-style rifle with a matte black finish and a streamlined, tactical design. The rifle features a skeletonized fixed stock, a prominent pistol grip, and a detachable curved magazine. The upper receiver is equipped with a Picatinny rail for mounting optics, and the rifle is fitted with iron sights. The barrel is short and robust, with a simple cylindrical muzzle and no visible muzzle device. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal with some polymer components, giving it a durable and lightweight appearance suitable for urban environments.
description: A compact, matte black tactical rifle with a skeletonized stock, curved magazine, and iron sights. It features a short barrel and a Picatinny rail for optics.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the skeletonized stock, pistol grip, curved magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular muzzle, front sight, and narrow profile of the barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with clear visibility of the magazine and stock structure.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the end of the stock, rear sight, and the alignment of the rifle's components.
